ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement for the size in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement for the size in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement for the size in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement for the size in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement for the size in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement for the size in inches */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement for the size in inches */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement for the size in inches */,
  "cuff" REAL /* Cuff measurement for the size in inches */,
  "neck" REAL /* Neck measurement for the size in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparel_types" (
  "apparel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of apparel */,
  "apparel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the apparel type (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Outerwear) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the apparel (e.g., casual, formal, sportswear) */,
  "seasonality" TEXT /* Season for which the apparel is designed (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the apparel is designed (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apparel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or market for the sizing standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of sizing standard (e.g., numeric, alphabetic, hybrid) */,
  "standard_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the sizing standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to sizes table */,
  "apparel_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to apparel types table */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to sizing standards table */,
  "chart_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the size chart is effective */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart is retired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES sizing_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_apparel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("apparel_type_id") REFERENCES apparel_types ("apparel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, marketer, customer service) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to size chart */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "apparel_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to apparel types */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to sizes */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the size */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count for the size */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "return_count" INTEGER /* Number of returns for the size */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Return rate as a percentage */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by users for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_analytics_apparel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("apparel_type_id") REFERENCES apparel_types ("apparel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizing_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to users */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to sizes */,
  "apparel_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to apparel types */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "fit_accuracy" TEXT /* How accurately the size fits (e.g., too small, too large, perfect) */,
  "fit_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the fit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_apparel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("apparel_type_id") REFERENCES apparel_types ("apparel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guide */,
  "guide_title" TEXT /* Title of the guide */,
  "guide_content" TEXT /* Content providing instructions on measuring sizes */,
  "apparel_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to apparel types */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to sizing standards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_apparel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("apparel_type_id") REFERENCES apparel_types ("apparel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES sizing_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "apparel_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to apparel types */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to sizes */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of items in stock for this size */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for triggering a reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_apparel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("apparel_type_id") REFERENCES apparel_types ("apparel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
